OVER 50 YEARS OF

EXCELLENCE

IN SALES AND SERVICE

WHO WE ARE

YOUR TRUSTED PARTNER
IN PLUMBING AND HEATING

Building on a legacy since 1971, Canadian Aqualine Sales Inc. has become the trusted choice in the plumbing and heating industry. Our commitment to exceptional service and top-quality products at the most competitive prices has solidified our reputation over the years.

​

At Canadian Aqualine, a professional and customer-focused approach defines our operations. From swift and accurate handling of quotations and orders to our emphasis on quality and service, we understand that a satisfied customer is a returning customer. Our team is dedicated to going the extra mile, ensuring your experience is not just a transaction but the beginning of a long-term partnership.

WHAT WE OFFER

OUR PRODUCT LINES

WE CARRY STOCK LOCALLY

10,000 square foot warehouse

in Delta

4,000 square foot warehouse

in Calgary

We take pride in our commitment to local accessibility, ensuring our warehouses carry an extensive range of products right in your vicinity. With our focus on keeping stock locally, we ensure quick and efficient access to essential plumbing and heating supplies, minimizing wait times for our valued customers.

Read More

TWO OFFICES, TWO PROVINCES

Delta

British Columbia

Calgary

Alberta

We have locations in both British Columbia and Alberta. Our dual presence ensures localized service, catering to diverse needs in these dynamic regions. No matter where you are, Canadian Aqualine brings quality plumbing and heating supplies closer to you.

Read More

HOW WE DO IT

OUR COMMITMENT

We believe in continuous learning and global engagement, regularly attending technical training sessions worldwide to keep our team abreast of the latest technologies. In-house training seminars for our customers and the trades further reflect our commitment to knowledge-sharing.
